room.caption: [G4-3A] That enemy will be put to better use here than it was in its own game. Zephyr for president.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(29) global.mapTeleport=9
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh8MainA)
bgFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) bgFollow.type=2; bgFollow.backSet=backMM_ToxicJungleA bgFollow.xMoveScale=0.6; bgFollow.yMoveScale=1 bgFollow.image_xscale=1.875; bgFollow.image_yscale=1.6 bgFollow.depth=1499999
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(409) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
